contact.title: Contact Form
contact.summary: Contact form with CAPTCHA guard and Slack notification stub.

customer-account.title: Customer Account
customer-account.summary: Passwordless customer sign-in (magic-link + email-OTP) plus a /account dashboard, linked-accounts settings, and a server-side session helper.

members-only-purchase.title: Members-only Purchase
members-only-purchase.summary: Requires a signed-in customer session before checkout. Reads CHECKOUT_POLICY env ("open" | "members-only"); host wires the guard at the top of /api/checkout/start.

customer-profile.title: Customer Profile (Addresses)
customer-profile.summary: KV-backed profile + shipping-address book at /account/profile. Add / remove / set-default form-POST UI; no JS required. Depends on customer-account for the session helper.

media-r2.title: Media hosting on R2 (opt-in)
media-r2.summary: Opt-in R2-backed media hosting. Wires the [[r2_buckets]] binding + four env vars + an interactive `media-r2:provision` script that drives bucket create, CORS, and secret put. First-run install stays R2-free; the script is only run when the operator is ready to open Cloudflare billing.

email-sender-smtp.title: SMTP email sender (self-hosted)
email-sender-smtp.summary: Source-owned SmtpEmailSender adapter for Workers via worker-mailer. Implements Mantle's narrow EmailSender port over SMTP (465 implicit TLS by default; port 25 rejected). Pairs with customer-account so passwordless sign-in mail goes through a real SMTP server instead of the console sink.
